studies.title: Feasibility of Priovi, an e-health tool based on schema therapy to treat patients with Borderline Personaility Disorder, as support to face-to-face psychotherapy - a qualitative case study

_verification.reason: The study explicitly mentions 'Priovi' in the title, which matches the name of the digital therapeutic product described. Additionally, the study references schema therapy, which aligns with the product's description. While the abstract is not available and the intervention is not specified, the title provides sufficient evidence to confirm relevance.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a qualitative case study, which aligns with observational research methods typically found in RWE. There is no mention of randomization, blinding, or interventional design indicative of an RCT.
